Compress Image to 100KB

This free tool helps reduce image size online to around 100KB for form uploads, profile photos, and document portals. No installation required.

Open 100KB Image Compressor

How to Compress to 100KB

  1. Upload JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image.
  2. Set target near 100KB in the KB resizer.
  3. Adjust quality and generate output.
  4. Download and upload to your portal.
